_comment: Suggested allowlist for the clipspal-hooks skill. To install: from your project root, run `! python3 ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/scripts/install_permissions.py` (the leading `!` runs it in your own shell, bypassing the auto-mode classifier that blocks Claude from editing permission files). The installer merges these patterns into .claude/settings.local.json without clobbering existing entries. Covers plugin install (~/.claude/plugins/cache/clipspal-marketplace/clipspal-hooks/<version>/...) and manual install (~/.claude/skills/generate/).
